subject: Physics
questionText: Two point charges +2 uC and -3 uC are separated by 0.3 m. Force magnitude?
solutionDetailed: Convert charges to coulombs and apply F = kq1q2/r^2.

subject: Mathematics
questionText: Evaluate lim x tends to 0 of sin x by x.
solutionDetailed: The standard trigonometric limit gives lim(sin x)/x = 1.
